channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Presidency addresses alleged fake federal agency scheme and ongoing court case over impersonation claims
item.description: The Presidency has reacted to allegations surrounding Adeniyi Adeyemi Matthew, who is accused of creating and operating a non-existent government agency while posing as its director-general. According...

item.title: TechCrunch publishes comprehensive glossary explaining key artificial intelligence terms and concepts
item.description: TechCrunch presents an extensive, regularly updated glossary designed to help readers understand the rapidly evolving vocabulary of artificial intelligence. As AI becomes increasingly embedded in tech...

item.title: Ontario's Plan to Expand Billy Bishop Airport and Its Economic Implications
item.description: The article discusses Ontario Premier Doug Ford's plan to expand Toronto’s Billy Bishop airport to allow jet flights, sparking debate among residents and stakeholders. Critics argue the expansion coul...

item.title: Assam District Orders Deportation of Man Deemed Foreigner
item.description: The Assam district authorities have ordered the deportation of Kayam Ansari, a man declared a foreigner by a Foreigners’ Tribunal in 2008. Under the Immigrants (Expulsion from Assam) Act, 1950, Ansari...

item.title: MQM-P Threatens Protests Over Unimplemented Karachi Development Agreement
item.description: MQM-P senior leader Dr Farooq Sattar has issued a stern warning that the party will resort to street protests and move to the opposition benches if the federal government fails to implement the 18-poi...

item.title: IOL Journalists Mervyn Naidoo and Ayanda Ndamane Recognized at 2026 Sikuvile Awards
item.description: IOL journalists Mervyn Naidoo and photojournalist Ayanda Ndamane were among the standout winners at the 2026 Standard Bank Sikuvile Journalism Awards, which celebrate excellence in South African media...

item.title: INEC extends CVR deadline to July 26, 2026, introduces online voter registration for first-time voters
item.description: The Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) has announced a two-week extension of the nationwide Continuous Voter Registration (CVR) exercise, now ending on July 26, 2026. This decision follo...

item.title: Protesters in Vancouver Call for Marcos' Resignation During Canada Visit

item.title: Egyptian fans celebrate World Cup victory with chaotic London street party

item.title: Reflections on America's 250th Anniversary and the Legacy of Liberty
item.description: This article commemorates the 250th anniversary of the United States, reflecting on its founding principles of liberty and the ongoing struggle to uphold them. The author highlights the nation's histo...

item.title: Kwara State Court Sets July 22 for Saraki's Defamation Case Arraignment
item.description: A Kwara State High Court sitting in Ilorin has scheduled July 22, 2026, for the arraignment of former Senate President Dr. Bukola Saraki on charges of criminal defamation. The court ruled that the cas...

item.title: NASA's Telescope Faces Potential Collision with Earth
item.description: A California farmer, Cesar Mora, is giving away tons of nectarines due to a contract dispute with a distributor, sparking community support and highlighting issues of food waste and economic hardship....

item.title: Tanzania Establishes Capital Markets Authority to Attract Investment
